PathN)
approx)
compare_images)
_image_directoriesz
im1, im2, tol, expect_rms)
basn3p02.png
basn3p02-minorchange.png
basn3p02-1px-offset.pngr
basn3p02-half-1px-offset.pngr
basn3p02-scrambled.pngr
all127.png
all128.pngr
    Compare two images, expecting a particular RMS error.
    im1 and im2 are filenames relative to the baseline_dir directory.
    tol is the tolerance to pass to compare_images.
    expect_rms is the expected RMS value, or None. If None, the test will
    succeed if compare_images succeeds. Otherwise, the test will succeed if
    compare_images fails and returns an RMS error almost equal to this value.
    c
dummy
J/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/matplotlib/tests/test_compare_images.py

tolZ
in_decoratorN)

mapr

result_dirZ

 test_image_comparison_expect_rms

matplotlib.testing.comparer
